name: quantoracle-mcp
description: Grounded quant finance math for AI agents over MCP. LLMs drift 5-30% on Black-Scholes Greeks and silently fail at Kelly, Sharpe, and VaR — this server is deterministic, citation-tested math (Hull, Wilmott, Lopez de Prado). 63 calculators (options pricing, Greeks, derivatives, risk metrics, portfolio optimization, Monte Carlo, statistics, crypto/DeFi, macro/FX, TVM) plus 10 composite workflows (risk audit, hedge recommend, strategy optimize, rebalance plan). 1,000 free calls/day; paid composites via x402 USDC on Base or Solana.
author: QuantOracle
